task_completion.description: Verify that the specified bookmark folders have been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the bookmarks bar or Bookmark Manager in Chrome. Verify the presence of folders named 'Weather & Sea State', 'Vessel Tracking', 'Catch Reporting', 'Port Authorities', and 'Crew'.

task_completion.description: Verify that images are blocked globally with the specified exceptions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at Chrome's Site Settings for Images. Verify the default behavior is set to 'Don't allow sites to show images' and the 'Allowed to show images' section contains 'ocean.weather.gov', 'marine.rutgers.edu', and 'oscar.noaa.gov'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the specified Chrome flags are configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the chrome://flags page. Verify that 'Parallel downloading' is set to 'Enabled' and 'Smooth Scrolling' is set to 'Disabled'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the custom search engine for MMSI has been added.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at Chrome's 'Manage search engines and site search' settings. Verify there is an entry with the keyword 'mmsi' and the URL 'https://www.marinetraffic.com/en/ais/details/ships/mmsi:%s'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the browser is set to open the specified URLs on startup.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at Chrome's 'On startup' settings. Verify 'Open a specific page or set of pages' is selected and the list includes 'ocean.weather.gov' and 'marinetraffic.com'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the download directory is set and the prompt to ask where to save is disabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at Chrome's Download settings. Verify the Location is set to '/home/ga/Documents/Catch_Logs' and the 'Ask where to save each file before downloading' toggle is switched off.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Chrome browser GUI to configure settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the screenshots show the agent navigating through Chrome's settings menus rather than using terminal commands to modify Chrome's JSON preferences files.

integrity.description: Verify that the screenshots show the genuine Chrome browser interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the settings pages shown belong to the actual Google Chrome browser and not a mock interface or text editor.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not just write the configuration values into a text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the agent did not simply open a text editor and type out the expected settings or URLs to simulate task completion.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected bookmark folders: 'Weather & Sea State', 'Vessel Tracking', 'Catch Reporting', 'Port Authorities', 'Crew'. Image exceptions: 'ocean.weather.gov', 'marine.rutgers.edu', 'oscar.noaa.gov'. Flags: 'Parallel downloading' enabled, 'Smooth Scrolling' disabled. Search keyword: 'mmsi', URL pattern: 'marinetraffic.com/en/ais/details/ships/mmsi:%s'. Startup URLs: 'ocean.weather.gov', 'marinetraffic.com'. Download directory: '/home/ga/Documents/Catch_Logs'.
